text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Volunteer Opportunities * Veterans 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Autism Spectrum Disorder Child Abuse Issues Disaster/Emergency Issues Domestic Violence Issues Foster Children Homelessness Issues Seasonal Workers Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VA REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON DAV TRANSPORTATION NETWORK PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers transportation to and from the Portland VA Medical Center. Does not provide wheelchair-accessible transportation or door-to-door service. 100 SW Main Street Room 212a Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Veterans who have a verifiable appointment at Portland VA Medical Center. Hours: Varies (503) 721-7804 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VA REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON DAV TRANSPORTATION NETWORK PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER
